author: Serdar Gülbahar
name: UT DoubleAttn 3L-MLP
blurb: Non-record 16MB run with a Universal Transformer architecture using two attention sublayers and a 3-layer MLP, trained with a depth schedule 2->6 under a 600s wallclock cap; pre-quant stop reached 1.2542 BPB and the final int8+zlib roundtrip scored 1.2560 under the size limit.
